name: Gladly
description: Customer service platform (inbox) that centralizes customer conversations across channels and exposes a REST API for integrations.

auth_methods.note: Docs state Gladly uses token-based Basic Authentication: use the user's email as the username and an API token as the password.

credential_access.note: Help center shows how to generate API tokens in Settings > App Developer Tools > API Tokens; procedure implies developers can self-generate tokens from the product UI without contacting sales.

api_surface.note: API reference lists many REST endpoints across conversations, contacts, messages, webhooks, etc., indicating broad REST coverage. No public GraphQL docs found.

buildability.note: Public REST docs plus self-serve API token generation allow immediate integration and development using Basic auth with API tokens.

queries: Gladly API developer documentation site Gladly API authentication "Gladly API" "developer" site:gladly.com OR site:developers.gladly.com OR site:docs.gladly.com OR "Gladly API" authentication "API key"
site:gladly.com "App Platform" "API" Gladly pricing API access "partner" "partnership" "contact sales"
